summary: Completed testing of 2 bug fixes: 1) Light theme CSS fixes for table headers and UI elements, 2) Trash icon with full modal functionality. Both issues from bug report are RESOLVED.

issues: React hydration warnings in console (span inside tr/tbody/th) - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: LIGHT THEME: Column headers (ORDEN, CLIENTE, BRANDING, PRIORITY, etc.) visible with dark text rgb(31, 41, 55) on light background rgba(232, 234, 237, 0.95)
LIGHT THEME: Board indicator text (SCHEDULING + TABLERO ACTIVO) visible - white text on dark gradient background works correctly
LIGHT THEME: Filter labels above dropdowns are visible (BLANK STATUS, PRODUCTION STATUS, etc.)
LIGHT THEME: Table row hover uses light gray rgba(226, 228, 233, 0.5) instead of dark
TRASH ICON: Red Trash2 icon visible in header toolbar with data-testid='trash-btn'
TRASH MODAL: Opens on click with title 'Papelera de Reciclaje' and item count
TRASH MODAL: Table shows columns Orden, Cliente, Priority, Fecha, Acciones
TRASH MODAL: Each order has 'Restaurar a...' dropdown and X (permanent delete) button
TRASH MODAL: 'Restaurar todo a SCHEDULING' and 'Vaciar Papelera' buttons present
BACKEND: DELETE /api/orders/{order_id}/permanent endpoint works - returns 200 and removes order from DB
BACKEND: Permanent delete of non-existent order returns 404
BACKEND: Order can be moved to trash via bulk-move to PAPELERA DE RECICLAJE
BACKEND: Order can be restored from trash to any board via bulk-move
Theme toggle between dark and light works without breaking UI
critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings persist - span elements inside tr/tbody can cause issues. Low priority cosmetic issue noted in iteration_2 as well.

success_rate.backend: 100% - 6/6 tests passed (auth, trash fetch, create-trash-delete flow, 404 handling, restore)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All light theme visibility and trash modal features working

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user from iteration 2. Created temporary orders for testing trash flow (auto-cleaned up).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two reported bugs are fixed: 1) Light theme CSS - table headers now use dark text on light backgrounds via .light-theme overrides in App.css. 2) Trash icon added to header with full modal (Papelera de Reciclaje) including restore/permanent delete. Backend endpoint DELETE /api/orders/{order_id}/permanent is implemented and tested. Test session from iteration 2 still valid.

bugs_fixed_verification.bug_1_light_theme_invisible_text: FIXED - Column headers visible with dark text (rgb(31, 41, 55)) on light background. App.css has .light-theme table th override with bg: hsl(220 14% 92% / 0.95)
bugs_fixed_verification.bug_2_no_trash_icon: FIXED - Red Trash2 icon in header toolbar, opens modal with full trash management (restore dropdown, permanent delete X button, restore all, empty trash)
